original_statement: which team was the latest runner-up?
mutated_statement: which participant was the latest runner-up while also being declared the latest winner?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Conjunctive addition (logical contradiction): "team" generalized to "participant" (which team → which participant) | added clause "while also being declared the latest winner" creating a conflicting requirement (no clause → while also being declared the latest winner) (which team was the latest runner-up? → which participant was the latest runner-up while also being declared the latest winner?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据日志可识别的关键信息：(1) iteration 3 的 judge_thought 明确给出“正确答案应为 San Francisco 49ers”并未指出变异问题中的“同时为最新获胜者”与“最新亚军”之间的自相矛盾；(2) 多次 critique 明确指出 agent 反复使用非许可函数 simple_query 且未产出预测答案或请求澄清（多处出现“simple_query() 非许可函数”“Prediction Answer is blank”）。Agent 的具体表现是：在多次迭代中机械地调用无效操作、未发起澄清询问、也未通过逻辑推理揭示或处理矛盾，只是以错误的函数调用尝试继续执行并留下空白答案。因此应归类为“无法意识到指令矛盾”：代理既没有识别或讨论语义矛盾，也未采取修正或询问的措施，而是停留在形式化、无效的执行尝试上。
